somali.how_space_explorer_works_click_to_togg: 📜 Sida Space Explorer u shaqeeyo (guji si aad u beddesho)
somali.pick_a_destination_get_8_17_turns_to_s: Dooro meel aad tagto. Waxaad heshaa 8-17 leexasho si aad uga badbaaddo khataraha iyadoo la ururinayo sayniska. Wareeg kasta waxaad dejisaa qaybinta tamarta, waad bilaabdaa, dhacdo ay AI abuurtay ayaa kicisa, oo waxaad doorataa sida shaqaalahaagu u jawaabayaan. Guul = ka badbaadida dhammaan wareegyada. Guuldarro = O₂ ama huubka wuxuu gaadhaa eber.
somali.engineer_medic_scientist_etc_unlock_a_: (injineer, dhakhtar, saynisyahan, iwm.) waxay fureen doorasho 4-aad oo qarsoon marka dhacdadu la mid noqoto xirfaddooda. Taabo xubin shaqaale inta lagu jiro dhacdo si aad ula tashato.
somali.opens_once_you_have_50_science_permane: wuxuu furmaa marka aad haysato saynis 50+. Cusboonaysiinta joogtada ah ee yareeya isticmaalka kheyraadka ama furta doorashooyin cusub.
somali.life_science_shields_comms_lets_you_bi: (Nolosha / Sayniska / Gaashaammada / Isgaadhsiinta) wuxuu kuu ogolaanayaa inaad u janjeerto isticmaalka kheyraadka wareeg kasta. Go'aan ka hor bilaabista.
somali.tip_harder_destinations_give_more_scie: Talo: meelaha adag waxay siiyaan saynis badan. Mars iyo Dayaxa waa meelaha ugu ammaanka badan ee bilowga. Guulaha, % ugu fiican iyo wadarta sayniska ayaa la raacaa meel ahaan hoosta tijaab kasta.
somali.roguelike_missions_across_the_solar_sy: Hawlo roguelike ah oo ka mid ah nidaamka qoraxda. Wareeg kasta wuxuu baraa saynis cusub.
somali.available_mission_destinations: Meelaha hawsha ee la heli karo
somali.each_pip_reduces_o_drain_by_1: Dhibic kasta waxay yaraysaa isticmaalka O₂ 1.
somali.each_pip_adds_1_science_at_event_resol: Dhibic kasta waxay ku dartaa +1 saynis xalka dhacdada.
somali.each_pip_mitigates_1_point_of_hull_dam: Dhibic kasta waxay yaraysaa 1 dhibic oo dhaawac huub.
somali.3_pips_waives_wrong_specialty_consult_: 3+ dhibic waxay ka dhaafayaan ciqaabta la-talinta takhasus khaldan.
somali.consult_a_specialist_about_this_event: La tashado khabiir ku saabsan dhacdadan
somali.choose_your_response_press_1_2_or_3_to: Dooro jawaabkaaga. Riix 1, 2, ama 3 si aad u doorato.
somali.mission_complete_preparing_debrief: 🎉 Hawsha waa la dhammeeyay! Diyaarinta warbixinta...
somali.critical_failure_mission_ending: ⚠️ Guuldarro halis ah! Hawshu way dhammaanaysaa...
somali.spacecraft_orbits_indefinitely_mission: Markabka hawada wuxuu wareegaa muddo aan xadidnayn. Hawshu way suurtagal tahay.
somali.atmospheric_drag_slowly_lowers_orbit: Jiidashada jawiga ayaa hoos u dhigaysa wareegga si tartiib ah.
somali.eccentricity_too_high_leaves_system: Eccentricity aad bay u sarreysaa — way ka tagaysaa nidaamka.
somali.adjust_sma_eccentricity_drag_widget_sh: Hagaaji SMA, eccentricity, jiidasho. Widget-ku wuxuu muujiyaa 4 natiijo wareeg oo kala duwan. Dhibco ma jiraan, daahfur ma jiro.
somali.hypothesis_what_combination_produces_e: Mala-awaal: isku-darka kee ayaa soo saara baxsashada?
somali.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Waad ku dhegtay — muuji su'aalaha furan
somali.find_two_stable_orbits_with_very_diffe: Hel laba wareeg oo deggan oo leh SMA aad u kala duwan.
somali.why_does_increasing_eccentricity_at_hi: Maxay kordhinta eccentricity-ga SMA sare u keentaa baxsasho laakiin ma keento shil?
somali.explain_how_sma_eccentricity_and_drag_: Sharax sida SMA, eccentricity iyo jiidasho ay si wadajir ah u go'aamiyaan masiirka wareegga.
somali.design_note_discrete_4_state_orbital_m: Qoraalka naqshadeynta: calaamad wareeg oo kala duwan oo 4 xaaladood ah; dhibco waxtarka shidaalka ma jiraan; daahfur ma jiro — si ula kac ah.
somali.loading_space_explorer: Waxaa la soo rarayaa Space Explorer...

lingala.how_space_explorer_works_click_to_togg: 📜 Ndenge Space Explorer esalaka (finá mpo na kobongola)
lingala.pick_a_destination_get_8_17_turns_to_s: Pona esika ya kokende. Ozali kozwa baturu 8-17 mpo na kobika na makama na yango wana ozali kosangisa siansi. Turu nyonso opona bokaboli ya nguya, obwaki, likambo oyo AI esali ebandi, mpe opona ndenge basali na yo bakoyanola. Elonga = kobika baturu nyonso. Kokweya = O₂ to ebende ekómi na zero.
lingala.engineer_medic_scientist_etc_unlock_a_: (enjenieri, monganga, moto ya siansi, bb.) bafungolaka boponi ya 4 ebombami soki likambo ekokani na mayele na bango. Simbá moto ya mosala na ntango ya likambo mpo na kotuna toli.
lingala.opens_once_you_have_50_science_permane: efungwamaka soki ozali na siansi 50+. Bambongwana ya libela oyo ekitisaka bosaleli ya biloko to efungolaka baoptio ya sika.
lingala.life_science_shields_comms_lets_you_bi: (Bomoi / Siansi / Banguba / Boyokani) epesaka yo nzela ya kotengama bosaleli ya biloko turu nyonso. Ekateli liboso ya kobwaka.
lingala.tip_harder_destinations_give_more_scie: Toli: bisika ya makasi epesaka siansi mingi. Mars na Sanza ezali bisika ya kobanda oyo ebatelami mingi. Balonga, % ya malamu mingi na motango ya siansi etalelamaka na esika na nse ya tuile nyonso.
lingala.roguelike_missions_across_the_solar_sy: Misala roguelike na sistemu ya moi. Lisano nyonso eteyaka siansi ya sika.
lingala.each_pip_reduces_o_drain_by_1: Litɔnɔ nyonso ekitisaka bosaleli ya O₂ na 1.
lingala.each_pip_adds_1_science_at_event_resol: Litɔnɔ nyonso ebakisaka +1 siansi na bosili ya likambo.
lingala.each_pip_mitigates_1_point_of_hull_dam: Litɔnɔ nyonso ekitisaka litɔnɔ 1 ya kobeba ya ebende.
lingala.3_pips_waives_wrong_specialty_consult_: Bitɔnɔ 3+ elongolaka etumbu ya toli ya mayele ya mabe.
lingala.consult_a_specialist_about_this_event: Tuná moto ya mayele na ntina ya likambo oyo
lingala.choose_your_response_press_1_2_or_3_to: Pona eyano na yo. Finá 1, 2, to 3 mpo na kopona.
lingala.critical_failure_mission_ending: ⚠️ Libungi ya monene! Mosala ezali kosila...
lingala.spacecraft_orbits_indefinitely_mission: Masuwa ya likoló ezingaka mpo na ntango oyo ekoki te. Mosala ekoki kosalema.
lingala.atmospheric_drag_slowly_lowers_orbit: Bokangi ya mopepe ekitisaka zingazinga malɛmbɛ.
lingala.eccentricity_too_high_leaves_system: Eccentricity ezali likoló mingi — etiki sistemu.
lingala.adjust_sma_eccentricity_drag_widget_sh: Bongisa SMA, eccentricity, bokangi. Widget elakisaka ba-mbano ya zingazinga 4 ekeseni. Bapwɛ ezali te, bomoni ezali te.
lingala.find_two_stable_orbits_with_very_diffe: Luka bazingazinga mibale ya makasi na SMA oyo ekeseni mingi.
lingala.why_does_increasing_eccentricity_at_hi: Mpo na nini kobakisa eccentricity na SMA ya likoló ebimisaka kokima kasi kokweya te?
lingala.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Nasosoli — limbola na maloba na yo
lingala.explain_how_sma_eccentricity_and_drag_: Limbola ndenge SMA, eccentricity na bokangi ekateli esika moko mbano ya zingazinga.
lingala.design_note_discrete_4_state_orbital_m: Note ya bosaleli: elembo ya zingazinga ekeseni ya bizaleli 4; bapwɛ ya bokoki ya mafuta ezali te; bomoni ezali te — na nko.
